a:T1c98,<div class="question">
<p>A ball of mass <em>m </em>strikes a vertical wall with a speed <em>v </em>at an angle of <em>θ</em> to the wall. The ball rebounds at the same speed and angle. What is the change in the magnitude of the momentum of the ball?</p>
<p><img alt="" src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>A. 2 <em>mv </em>sin <em>θ<br/></em>B. 2 <em>mv </em>cos <em>θ<br/></em>C. 2 <em>mv <br/></em>D. zero</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"16N.1.SL.TZ0.8"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"16N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-4-momentum-and-impulse"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>B</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Momentum is a vector quantity so the angle and the direction are both relevant to the answer. Hence C and D can be eliminated. If θ = 900, then the ball is just rolling down the wall and there is no change in momentum. Hence B is correct (cos900 = 0).</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
